2019-2020 Fall Semester's PhD Qualification Exam

Dear Business Administration Phd Students,

2019-2020 Fall Semester's PhD Qualification Exam (Written Part) will be held at 19 November 2019 at 10.00 o'clock in the morning. Campus: Mecidiyeköy.

For your information.
